summary: Storage layer v1.0.0 implemented with SQLite CRUD, Fernet encryption for secrets, UUID identifiers, and ModuleManifest support. All 52 tests passing.

files.description: SQLite schema with 7 tables: projects, briefs, runs, config, secrets, modules, backups
CRUD operations for all entities with Fernet encryption
Database initialization and migration utilities (MVP: init only)
52 comprehensive tests covering all CRUD, encryption, and edge cases
Full documentation with API reference and usage examples

commands: export EURKAI_SECRET_KEY=$(python -c "from cryptography.fernet import Fernet; print(Fernet.generate_key().decode())")
